scripts.electron:dev: env -u DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS -u DBUS_SYSTEM_BUS_ADDRESS NODE_ENV=development xvfb-run -a electron . --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-features=UsePortal
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run ui:build && env -u DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS -u DBUS_SYSTEM_BUS_ADDRESS xvfb-run -a electron . --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-features=UsePortal
